title: Clean up pre-existing ruff debt in bluewatch.py
description:
ruff check/format flags pre-existing issues in bluewatch.py, deliberately left out of the v1.3.2 embed fix to keep that diff focused:
- F401: unused 'from atproto import models' (~line 336)
- F541: f-strings without placeholders (~lines 356, 407, others)
- ruff format: trailing whitespace and missing blank lines between top-level defs

Run 'uvx ruff check --fix bluewatch.py && uvx ruff format bluewatch.py' and verify behavior unchanged. Do as a standalone formatting-only PR.
close_reason: Applied ruff check --fix and ruff format; formatting-only, behavior verified unchanged
